sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁא

Transliteration: nâshâ'

Phonetic: naw-shaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to lend on interest or usury, be a creditor
    1. (Qal) creditor (participle)
    2. (Hiphil) to act as a creditor

Origin: a primitive root [perhaps identical with H5377, through the idea of imposition]

TWOT entry: 1424

Part(s) of speech: Verb
